creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port ja-gp-2.5 (japanese/gp).

	Current modifications are

		(1) Slave to print/gp
		(2) Update 2.01 to 2.5

	Delete and Update files are respecively

	[Delete] :
		files
		files/filetype.tmpl
		files/md5
		files/patch-GP
		files/pr-setup.sh
		files/printer.tmpl
		files/

	[Update] :
		Makefile
		pkg/DESCR
		pkg/PLIST

	I put the diff from ports-current(japanese/gp) in "Fix:".
